name: kanban-for-agent
description: Kanban full-stack application for syncing human and agent work progress

scripts.dev: cd frontend && npm run dev && cd ../backend && npm run dev
scripts.install: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.build:dev: npm run build && docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml build
scripts.build:test: npm run build && docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml build
scripts.build:prod: npm run build && docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml build
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: cd frontend && npm run test:unit && cd ../backend && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:e2e: cd frontend && npm run test:e2e && cd ../backend && npm run test:e2e
scripts.lint: cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../backend && npm run lint
